name: Scallops Florentine
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 lb Fresh spinach, stems cut off and reserved
1 Cut off and reserved 8 ea Shell or small pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 425.
2. Mince spinach stems and garlic in a food processor.
3. Melt butter in a heavy skillet over medium-low heat.
4. Stir in the garlic mixture and sauté until spinach stems are very soft (about 8 minutes).
5. Add whipping cream and simmer until reduced by half (about 5 minutes).
6. Coarsely chop spinach leaves in batches, using off and on turns in a food processor.
7. Add to cream mixture with nutmeg and pepper.
8. Increase heat to high and cook until spinach is heated through about 3 minutes.
9. Remove from heat.
10. Stir in scallops and pasta. Transfer to a shallow 4-quart baking dish.
11. Sprinkle with reserved Parmesan cheese over top. Bake until scallops are just opaque, about 10 to 12 minutes. Serve immediately.
